## Overview

Complete HC IX Glossary archive containing 4,490 concept definitions compiled from 830 source documents. This archive represents the foundational vocabulary for μTOS development and Spiral Time equation documentation.

| Metric               | Count |

| Explicit Definitions | 4,490 |
| NEEDS_DEFINITION     | 813   |
| Symbol Collisions    | 957   |
| MD Sources Scanned   | 830   |
| PDF Sources          | 31    |

## Directory Structure

```
HC_IX_GLOSSARY/

└── INVENTORY.md         # Detailed metadata
```

## Version Notes (v1.5)

- Includes HC IX preferred disambiguation lines for top collision terms (Spiral 6)
- Complete glossary segments A-Z with 26,557 lines total
- Tau Equation Closure documentation (Spiral 8)
- Toolshed Principle implementation (Spiral 12)
